task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dashboard or home screen of NOSH ChartingSystem is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the internal messaging interface to compose a new message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Compose Message', 'New Message', or similar internal messaging dialog/window is open in the NOSH interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the recipient is set to Dr. Emily Brooks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To' or recipient field in the message composer contains 'Dr. Emily Brooks'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct subject is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject field contains exactly 'Lab Result Follow-up'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct message body is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message body area contains the text: 'Please review the CBC results for patient Conchita Hernandes and let me know if further workup is needed.'

task_completion.description: Verify the message was actually sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Message sent'), the message appearing in a 'Sent' folder, or the compose dialog closing after the send button was clicked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to send the message.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interaction occurs within a web browser showing the NOSH ChartingSystem. There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, API scripts, or direct database (MariaDB) queries.

integrity.description: Verify the message was composed in the actual EHR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding UI elements (menus, sidebars, headers) match a medical EHR system (NOSH), rather than a generic text editor or a locally created HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the message and stop without sending.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots must show evidence of the message being submitted/sent (e.g., clicking the send button, a confirmation toast, or viewing the sent box), not just a filled-out form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires logging into NOSH ChartingSystem as 'demo_provider' (Practice: Hillside Family Medicine). The target recipient is 'Dr. Emily Brooks'. The exact subject must be 'Lab Result Follow-up'. The exact message body must be 'Please review the CBC results for patient Conchita Hernandes and let me know if further workup is needed.' The patient referenced is Conchita Hernandes (PID 1).
